steps.title: Find each total height
steps.content:
Multiply each mean by the number of objects in that data set.
$$72\cdot30=2{,}160$$
$$48\cdot70=3{,}360$$

steps.title: Divide the combined total
steps.content: Add the two totals and divide by the combined number of objects. $$\frac{2{,}160+3{,}360}{120}=\frac{5{,}520}{120}=46$$ The answer is 46.
